notableEvents.label: Jackson Chourio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio singles on a line drive to left fielder Casey Schmitt.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jackson Chourio out at 3rd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.
